narrative:
Ballville D (precinct in Sandusky County) has 828 registered voters, with 43.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.6 percentage points.
